queries.question: Patient ids with more than 1 appointments.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM appointments GROUP BY patient_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

queries.question: Patient ids whose total invoiced amount exceeds 200.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT a.patient_id FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id GROUP BY a.patient_id HAVING SUM(i.total_amount) > 200

queries.question: Patient ids with lab results in more than 1 distinct test types.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN lab_results l ON l.appointment_id = a.appointment_id GROUP BY a.patient_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT l.test_name) > 1

queries.question: Patient ids with lab results in more than 2 distinct test types.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN lab_results l ON l.appointment_id = a.appointment_id GROUP BY a.patient_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT l.test_name) > 2

queries.question: Patient ids with more than 2 lab results overall.
